$ docker pull phpmyadmin@sha256:7143dd2cb3530f184b78a19cf57785802c50b2fe667386105c94faa2ac28f8e9

-	Manifest MIME: `application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json`
-	Total Size: **159.8 MB (159835110 bytes)**
